mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_members WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
SELECT * FROM team_members WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM team_members WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_members WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT tm.team_id, tm.user_id, tm.role, tm.joined_at, u.username, u.avatar FROM team_members tm INNER JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY CASE tm.role WHEN 'leader' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, tm.joined_at
